GB 30255一2019
value of Iuminous efficacy of each grade shall be decreased by 10 Im/W on the basis of the respec-
tive value specified in corresponding tables.
4.2 Minimum allowable value of energy efficiency
4.2.1 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency of LED downlights are the values of Grade 3
specified in Table 1.
4.2.2 ”Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency of directional integrated LED lamps are the
values of Grade 3 specified in Table 2.
4.2.3 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency of non-directional self-ballasted LED lamps are
the values of Grade 3 specified in Table 3.
4.3 Color Rendering Index (CRD
The initial CRI CR。.) of LED downlights, directional integrated LED lamps and non-directional self-bal-
lasted LED lamps shall not be less than 80 as well as Rs。 shall be greater than 0. The measured CRI val-
ue shall not have decreased by more than 3 points from the rated CRI value.
4.4 Lumen maintenance
The Ilumen maintenance at 3 000 h of LED downlights，directional integrated LED lamps and non-di-
rectional self-ballasted LED lamps shall not be less than the required value of Ilumen maintenance re-
lated to rated life. According to the claimed rated life, the required value of Ilumen maintenance shall
be calculated by Formula (1).

LM= (709% )                                                                                                       (1)

0

where

LM is Ilumen maintenance:

to is rated life， expressed in hours (h).
5 Test methods
5.1 LED Downlights
Luminous efficacy，correlated color temperature and color rendering index of LED downlights shall
be tested in accordance with test methods specified in GB/T 29293.
